Localization.Description: Access to database credentials (passwords, hashes, or both) can lead to compromise of PostgreSQL data

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Password hashes of the PostgreSQL database users are extracted on host {event_src.host} using an SQL command
Access to the gadmin4.db file that can contain PostgreSQL database passwords stored in the pgAdmin application on host {event_src.host}
Access to the credentials (passwords, hashes, or both) of the PostgreSQL database on host {event_src.host}
